allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,html,re; content=sys.stdin.read\(\); content=re.sub\(r'<script[^>]*>.*?</script>','',content,flags=re.DOTALL\); content=re.sub\(r'<style[^>]*>.*?</style>','',content,flags=re.DOTALL\); content=re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>','',content\); lines=[l.strip\(\) for l in content.splitlines\(\) if l.strip\(\)]; print\('\\n'.join\(lines[:150]\)\)")
